uplink.description: TERPM report frame (0B/3/00) with trailing battery-percent byte
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. expected.data authored by running reference/upstream-codec.js (parseTERPM) on this input; upstream emits string values + a locale-dependent date (6/15/2026, 2:30:20 PM) which we normalize to numbers + RFC3339 UTC. Sensor math (temp x100 signed, hum /2, pressure x100, PM u16-LE, battery %) confirmed bit-for-bit against upstream.

uplink.description: TERPM report frame (0B/3/00) without battery byte, negative temperature
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame, no trailing battery byte (19 bytes). expected.data authored from reference/upstream-codec.js (parseTERPM): temperature -3.10 C (signed two's-complement x100), humidity 80%, pressure 998.40 hPa, PM1=0 PM2.5=7 PM10=9.

uplink.description: unsupported frame id (not a 0x0B report-data frame)
uplink._note: Upstream returns {errors:['Error on decoding payload']} for any unhandled uplink id; we report the specific unsupported id 0x99.
